title: Yacht Rental Bahamas: Costs, Seasons, and Tips for 2026
html:
The Bahamas, with its 700 islands and crystal-clear waters, offers an unparalleled yachting destination. Departing from Nassau Harbour, expect to pay between USD 400 and USD 4,000 per day for a private charter. BoatHire24 connects travellers with local operators to compare options easily.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Bahamas?

Rental prices range from USD 100 for a shared tour to USD 3,500 for a fully crewed yacht per day. Costs vary by vessel size, season, and duration. A small motorboat for half a day starts around USD 400, while a catamaran for a full day is typically USD 1,500. For a luxury crewed yacht such as an Azimut, expect upwards of USD 3,000. Always check the total including fuel and taxes.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Bahamas?

No formal licence is required for bareboat charter, but you must present proof of competency. A valid RYA Day Skipper or equivalent International Certificate of Competence (ICC) is usually acceptable. If you lack a licence, you can hire a captain through the operator; the operator confirms exact requirements at booking. Self-steering is permitted for experienced skippers.

Where to set off in Bahamas

The archipelago offers many excellent departure points. For marinas, Nassau Harbour Marina and the Abaco Beach Resort Marina in Marsh Harbour are popular. For anchorages, consider the Exuma Cays Land and Sea Park, where you can moor at Warderick Wells. Other notable spots include the Bight of Acklins and the Staniel Cay Yacht Club dock. The distances between islands can be 20 to 50 nautical miles, so plan your fuel stops accordingly.

Which boat to rent

  1. Motor Yacht (e.g. Fairline 43), best for speed and comfort, up to 8 guests, from USD 1,200 per day. See the Fairline listing for full specs.
  2. Sailing Catamaran (e.g. Lagoon 42), best for stability and space, up to 10 guests, from USD 1,500 per day.
  3. Small Motorboat (e.g. Axopar 28), best for day trips and fishing, up to 6 guests, from USD 400 per half-day.
  4. Crewed Luxury Yacht (e.g. Azimut 60), best for all-inclusive experience, up to 10 guests, from USD 3,500 per day.
  5. RIB or Tender, best for exploring remote cays, up to 4 guests, from USD 250 per half-day.

Costs and price bands

Charter prices depend on the season, with peak rates from December to April. During the high season, a popular shared tour (e.g. to the Exuma Cays) costs around USD 100 per person. A half-day small motorboat rental for a private group may cost USD 400. A full-day catamaran charter for a party of 8 runs approximately USD 1,500. A crewed luxury yacht for 10 guests often exceeds USD 3,000 per day. All prices are subject to tax and fuel surcharges.

  • Shared guided tour: from USD 100 per person
  • Small motorboat (half-day): from USD 400
  • Catamaran (full-day): from USD 1,500 for up to 8 guests
  • Crewed luxury yacht (full-day): from USD 3,000 for up to 10 guests

Season and licence tips

Book your charter in advance during the peak months (December to April) when the weather is calm and the easterly trade winds are mild. For the best experience, consider exploring the Abaco Cays in spring.

At a glance

  • Price band: USD 100, USD 3,500+ per day
  • Peak months: December to April
  • Typical trip length: half-day (4 hours) to full-day (8 hours)
  • Maximum guests: 4 to 12 depending on vessel
  • Currency: USD
  • Licence required: ICC or RYA Day Skipper for bareboat; crewed charter no licence needed

Questions about boat rental in Bahamas

Can I rent a boat without a captain in the Bahamas?

Yes, you can if you hold a recognised boating licence such as an RYA Day Skipper or ICC, and the operator approves your experience.

What is the best time of year to charter a yacht in the Bahamas?

The best weather for yachting is from November to May, with the peak season being December to April when seas are calm and temperatures are pleasant.

How much does it cost to fuel a boat in the Bahamas in 2026?

Fuel prices vary, but typically USD 4 to USD 6 per gallon for diesel; budget around USD 200-400 for a day’s cruising on a small motorboat.

Are there any hidden fees when renting a boat in the Bahamas?

Always ask about fuel, taxes (approx 10%), and optional extras such as fishing permits or dinghy hire; these can add 20% to the base price.

To plan your boating holiday, browse the yacht charter Bahamas options on BoatHire24. Whether you want to explore the Exuma Cays or relax in the Abacos, the marketplace offers verified listings for every budget. If you own a boat in the islands, consider listing it to reach thousands of travellers.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Bahamas and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
